channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Why AI monitoring fails traditional tools
item.description: Cut AI hallucinations 74% with observability — prompt drift, context changes, and agent decisions you can’t see with traditional logs. 2026 metrics from a live system.

item.title: Cut origin load 80% with Workers
item.description: Cut origin load 80% with Cloudflare Workers — cache static assets, read-only API responses, and measure p95 latency drops from 412 ms to 89 ms while saving 42% on AWS bills.

item.title: TypeScript 5.3 changed how we model domains
item.description: Cut domain layer lines 75% with TypeScript 5.3 — branded types, template literal rules, and the `satisfies` operator that caught 100% of validation errors at compile time.

item.title: Custom agents beat frameworks in 2026
item.description: Custom agents beat frameworks in 2026 — latency, cost, and error-rate data from Nigerian 3G systems shows why CrewAI and LangGraph fail under partial failures and how a Redis-backed orchestrator handles them.

item.title: Small model fine-tuning wins in 2026
item.description: Cut LLM costs 75% in 2026 by fine-tuning 7B models — real latency, security, and cost numbers from a live system serving 500k daily requests.

item.title: Agentic coding’s year in prod: Claude Code’s wins
item.description: Cut PR review time 95% with Claude Code in 2026 — exact workspace config, policies, and audit trail that passed a GDPR audit. Learn what actually works after a year of daily use.

item.title: Avoid webhook delivery nightmares in 2026
item.description: Cut webhook latency 95% and AWS costs 58% with Step Functions Express, DynamoDB idempotency, and circuit breakers — the delivery guarantees we actually trust in 2026

item.title: Schema-per-tenant: the 3ms trap we fell into
item.description: Cut SaaS costs 53% with a hybrid tenant model — see how Aurora PostgreSQL 15, Envoy 1.28, and schema-per-tenant worked where RLS fell apart at 1,200 tenants.

item.title: AI alert triage cuts pages 60% in 2026
item.description: Cut pages 60% with AI alert triage — PagerDuty, Lambda, and scikit-learn 1.5 in a 400-line agent that costs $2 per 10k alerts and slashes wake-up fatigue in 2026.

item.title: AI rollout with LaunchDarkly 2026
item.description: Cut AI rollout risk 78% using LaunchDarkly 2026.2.1 — flag-based routing, sampling, rollback, and Prometheus observability in under 2 hours.

item.title: 4 AI tools that level the dev salary gap in 2026
item.description: Cut dev cycle time 73% with AI — which tools actually saved money in Nairobi fintech in 2026. Concrete benchmarks, cost per 1k calls, and the licensing trap most teams miss.

item.title: AI interviews: 4 questions that caught 80% of weak
item.description: Cut early-stage incidents 75% with AI interviews that test real production resilience — Redis 7.2 cache stampedes, latency under 150 ms P99, and 428 candidate screens in 2026.

item.title: Build apps that still work on 500 ms latency
item.description: Cut TTI 70% by moving to ECDSA TLS and Redis 7.2 edge cache — the exact changes teams made when Starlink beams lit up East Africa in 2026.

item.title: Breakdown: Nairobi SaaS stack costs in 2026
item.description: Nairobi SaaS stack 2026 bill: $2.7 k/month for 100 k requests, real cost breakdown, latency data, and the Redis pool mistake most teams repeat.

item.title: Postgres 17 beat Redis, Kafka, and S3: what we dropped
item.description: Cut $1.4k/month and three dashboards by replacing Redis, Kafka, and S3 with Postgres 17 in 2026. Cache, event streaming, and blobs under one roof — the latency numbers, cost breakdown, and the exact queries to check first.

item.title: AI agent postmortems: trace vs logs vs code
item.description: Cut AI agent postmortem time 70% with the right tool — evaluation logs vs tracing in 2026 with concrete numbers, costs, and code samples.

item.title: 3 ways container builds got 3x faster in 2026
item.description: Cut container build time 70% in 2026 with depot.dev, BuildKit 1.6, and remote caching — cache hit rates, latency, and cost breakdown for GitHub Actions and AWS

item.title: LLM metrics that stop wasting time
item.description: A seemingly minor change — adding a one-sentence preamble — can increase the output token count by 15%.

item.title: Killed my $3k Kubernetes bill with $200 Fly.io
item.description: Cut AWS costs 94% switching from EKS to Fly.io — Postgres, Redis, latency, and the migration steps that took two days and saved $2,944/month.

item.title: 2026 islands: Astro’s hydration edge
item.description: Cut API response time 44% with Astro islands: bundle shrinks 79%, LCP drops to 1.9 s on 3G, and infra costs fall 45% — here’s the exact strategy we used in 2026.
